note: Single source of truth for the synthetic test-data sizes (all six generated profiles). Measured 2026-07-24 against the GCS dataset: ledger_pack_bytes = `gsutil du` over <profile>/packs/cold/ledgers (the frozen ledger packs the benchmark ingests), ledger_pack_ledgers = ledgers actually frozen into those packs; raw_meta_gib and raw_meta_ledgers come from the 'Sizes'/'Ledgers' lines of each profile's METADATA.md. Derive averages, never bake them: avg raw ledger = raw_meta_gib*2^30/raw_meta_ledgers; avg packed ledger = ledger_pack_bytes/ledger_pack_ledgers. Both viewers (summary.html and index.html) may read this file; run units map here by stripping their concurrency suffix (sac-5000-c1 -> sac-5000).

sac-6000.partial: generation stopped at seq 11,008 of ~20,022; only chunk 1 (10,000 ledgers) was frozen into packs
